ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., G, F, C) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the player */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birthplace of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Whether the player is right-handed or left-handed */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The pick number in the draft */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* A list of previous teams the player has played for */,
  "contract_expiry" INTEGER /* The year the player's current contract expires */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* The player's social media handle for public engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* The name of the team's home arena */,
  "coach" TEXT /* The current head coach of the team */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* The current general manager of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the team */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* The team's social media handle for public engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played in the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played in the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fg_percent" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "tpm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "tpa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "tp_percent" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "ft_percent" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* The result of the game */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* The final score of the game */,
  "playoff_game" INTEGER /* Whether the game was a playoff game */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season the game was played in */,
  "minutes_played_quarter_1" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the first quarter */,
  "minutes_played_quarter_2" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the second quarter */,
  "minutes_played_quarter_3" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the third quarter */,
  "minutes_played_quarter_4" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the fourth quarter */,
  "overtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played in overtime, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
